subject: [PATCH v4 19/21] swap: simplify swapoff using virtual swap

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch simplifies and optimizes the swapoff process by utilizing virtual swap slots stored at page table entries, eliminating the need for a page table walk. Instead of traversing all VMAs, it iterates through allocated swap slots on the swapfile, finds their corresponding virtual swap slots, and faults them in. This approach reduces kernel CPU time by about 13% compared to the original code.
